name: @atomic-stockfish/ffish
description: Atomic-only rules API for JavaScript and WebAssembly

scripts.build: docker compose run --rm emscripten make -f Makefile_js all
scripts.build:debug: docker compose run --rm emscripten make -f Makefile_js all DEBUG=yes
scripts.repro: docker compose run --rm emscripten make -f Makefile_js repro
